title: GLM 5.2 Non-Thinking Variant
summary: Add a 'none' reasoning variant to GLM 5.2 in opencode.jsonc so thinking can be toggled off via Ctrl+T. Config variants merge with the built-in {high, max} computed variants, yielding {high, max, none}. The variant overrides OpenCode's hardcoded forced thinking at request time (highest merge precedence). Single model, no alias.
keyOutcomes: GLM-5.2 gains a 'none' variant selectable via Ctrl+T
Thinking is disabled at the API level when 'none' is selected
Built-in {high, max} variants are preserved alongside 'none'
No separate model alias created - single model zai-coding-plan/glm-5.2
risks: Z.ai API may reject or ignore thinking:{type:'disabled'} payload - unknown without live test (user-verified post-restart; fallback to clear_thinking:true or custom providerID escape hatch documented in spec.md)
Bun-is-not-defined tool failure in build env (mitigated: PowerShell [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText fallback for all file ops, documented in plan.md Phase 2.1)
JSONC comments must survive editing - use raw string replacement, not ConvertFrom-Json round-trip (mitigated: custom Test-JsonC parser in plan.md Phase 3.1)
deliverables: C:\Users\DaveWitkin\.config\opencode\opencode.jsonc (zai-coding-plan provider block with none variant added)
validationCriteria: Test-JsonC (custom JSONC parser) returns True for the new opencode.jsonc
All 6 built-in provider blocks (google, openai, moonshot, openrouter, go-dave, go-tiberius) are byte-identical to backup
Global model and small_model remain zai-coding-plan/glm-5.2
Compare-Object diff against backup shows ONLY the inserted zai-coding-plan block + a trailing comma on go-tiberius close line
Timestamped backup file exists with byte-identical content to pre-edit source
tracks.md row for this track shows complete and 2026-06-22 in Completed column
